name: Production Incident Response + Prevention
description: Critical incident requiring immediate response plus long-term preventive measures
task: Production outage: diagnose root cause via architectural analysis, implement immediate fixes with security hardening, prevent recurrence through code quality improvements and CVE scanning, establish post-incident review process, update git workflows and versioning strategy, coordinate across teams.

coding_challenge.description: Write an incident coordinator for production issues including root cause analysis, preventive measures, security hardening, git audit trail, versioning, CVE scanning, and workflow establishment. Return incident report with fixes.
